showPdfTitle.title: Show PDF title on viewer tabs
showPdfTitle.description: Whether to display the PDF's title (if present) in the titlebar/on the tabs, before the filename.

useLatestPdfjs.title: Use the latest PDF.js viewer
useLatestPdfjs.description: Whether to use the latest (untested) version of Firefox's PDF viewer (not recommended).

trackOutline.title: Track scroll position in document outline
trackOutline.description: Whether to automatically track the current scroll position in the document outline sidebar (if open).
